transcript: Ladies and gentlemen, please welcome Sir Simon Rattle. Tonight, as a tribute to the British film industry, he is conducting the London Symphony Orchestra in a performance of Chariots of Fire. © BF-WATCH TV 2021 © transcript Emily Beynon Thank you for watching. We'll be right back. © transcriptF-WATCH TV 2021 © transcript Emily Beynon Субтитры создавал DimaTorzok © transcript Emily Beynon Storbritannia 15 to 20 minutes They were having trouble, they kept telling me that I was turning to turn off the air-conditioning. Well that is, in this humour, at its best. Rowan Atkinson, Mr Bean. Famous surely all around the world. And I hope you laughed. You had a full-time job. Ladies and gentlemen, Mr rowan atkinson
